component.name: GenosLauncher
component.summary: Open source Minecraft launcher with modpack and mod manager support

description.p: GenosLauncher is a feature-rich Minecraft launcher built with PySide6. It supports Microsoft account authentication, multiple game instances, Modrinth and CurseForge mod browsing, modpack installation, shader packs, automatic Java management, and per-instance mod profiles.

ul.li: Microsoft account login via PKCE OAuth 2.0
Automatic Java download and version management (Eclipse Temurin)
Mod dependency resolution and conflict detection
JVM performance presets (Aikar's Flags, ZGC, Low Latency)
World backup and crash report viewer

description.p: Java auto-downloader, mod dependency resolver, enhanced Modrinth integration, and Linux packaging.

screenshot.caption: Main launcher window showing instance management
